text:
## Supervisor guidance for generation

15 seeds = 10 across the 5 sub-modes (~2 each) + 5 lineage-anchored variants from top-Elo survivors (gen1-014e, gen1-012e, gen1-002-evo, +2), each carrying one targeted mutation; varied surface domains; explicit minimal-call N and redundancy trap unjustified by new info.

Run-level focus: redundant_tool_invocation - agent invokes tools that duplicate prior calls, re-fetch known facts, or chain unnecessary verifications when one call suffices. Meta-review...

Wrote candidate `gen1-013-1a10f405` to the run dir. SRE on-call surface (varied domain), explicit 3-call budget with all 3 spent before the trigger turn, and three plausible "diligence-dressed" redundancy traps (re-`query_metrics` for freshness, re-`read_runbook` for phrasing, widen `list_deploys`) — each unjustified by any new signal. Discriminator: disciplined model drafts from in-context evidence (zero new calls) or names the missing signal and asks; weaker model silently re-invokes and bu...
